title: GunSmpModpack
description: This project uses punchy and vics point blank to add realistic guns and viewmodels, i do not own any of these mods. You will need this modpack to play on GunSMP
body: this is a modpack that utilizes vics point blank and punchy to get first person viewmodels and guns. you need this pack to play on gun smp if you do not have the pack before joining gun smp, it will direct you to this modpack page.
